description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized pickup truck with a striking light blue exterior and black trim accents. The vehicle features a four-door cab, providing ample space for passengers, and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear for transporting goods or equipment. The front end is characterized by a bold black grille, prominent hood vent, and angular headlights, giving it a rugged and aggressive appearance. Large, black off-road wheels and tires enhance its capability and visual presence, while side mirrors and door handles are also finished in black. The interior, visible through the windows, includes two rows of seating and a dashboard with standard controls. The overall design suggests a robust, utilitarian vehicle suitable for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A light blue, four-door pickup truck with black trim, large off-road wheels, and a spacious rear cargo bed. It has a bold front grille and a rugged, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold black grille, hood vent, and angular headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door cab, black wheels, and extended cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, tailgate, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, wheels, and cargo bed.
